title: refactor: reorganize abuse detection into tier-progression
author: ElliotEtag

gist.headline: Sweeping up the spores
gist.blurb: We've reorganized our internal tier progression scripts to make them more robust and easier to maintain. Just a little housekeeping to keep the hive running smoothly!
gist.summary: Refactored and reorganized the internal tier progression scripts into a dedicated directory with independent scanning and application steps.
gist.impact: Improves the reliability and maintainability of the automated tier management system, ensuring fairer usage across the platform.
gist.visual_concept: The bee mascot organizing files or sweeping up a server room. A little robot helper sorting folders labeled 'spore' and 'microbe'.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny janitor hat, sweeping up glowing digital dust in a server room. A chunky robot with a CRT monitor head is organizing lime green (#ecf874) folders labeled 'SPORE' and 'MICROBE'. Soft pastel gradient background, warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley.
